creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Upstream has updated to 1.4.14b on 07.06.2010, new patch attached.
Shlib is bumped to version 4. Updating PR synopsis as well.
There is no reply from maintainer for more than 1 month for this PR.
Tested all the ports below in tinderbox.

PORTREVISION bump required of:
databases/beansdb
databases/memcached
databases/memcached12
databases/memcachedb
databases/mysql-proxy
databases/pgbouncer
databases/sharedance
devel/eventxx
devel/ocaml-event
devel/p5-Event-Lib
devel/py-event
devel/thrift
dns/unbound
ftp/ftp-proxy
lang/php52
mail/dbmail23
net-im/msn-proxy
net/arpd
net/beanstalkd
net/honeyd
net/ladvd

net/nylon
net/openospfd
net/relayd.orig

net/spserver

security/stegdetect
